basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Accounts Assistant and Accounts Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) has released the official Accounts Assistant and Accounts Officer Notification 2026 at its official website. The total number of vacancies has not been mentioned under the HLL Accounts Assistant and Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including B.Com with 2 years of experience for Accounts Assistant and M.Com/MBA (Finance)/CA (Inter)/CMA (Inter) with 3 years of experience for Accounts Officer posts, and aged up to 37 years as of 01.07.2026, can attend the Walk-in Interview on 22 July 2026. application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 37 years as of 01.07.2026.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 37 years as of 01.07.2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates is as per Government of India directives.

qualification.details: Accounts Assistant: B.Com with 2 years of post-qualification experience in accounts and finance functions in a reputed establishment. Accounts Officer: M.Com / MBA (Finance) / CA (Inter) / CMA (Inter) with a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience in accounts and finance functions in a reputed establishment.

selection_process: No negative marks) Verification of original certificates and documents

rows.hll_lifecare_limited: Maximum age limit is 37 years as of 01.07.2026.

content_sections.heading: HLL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the HLL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download HLL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Accounts Assistant: B.Com with 2 years of post-qualification experience in accounts and finance functions in a reputed establishment. Accounts Officer: M.Com / MBA (Finance) / CA (Inter) / CMA (Inter) with a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience in accounts and finance functions in a reputed establishment.

content_sections.heading: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 37 years as of 01.07.2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates is as per Government of India directives.

content_sections.heading: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test (Multiple Choice Questions, 30 minutes duration, Max 50 marks, No negative marks) Verification of original certificates and documents

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for HLL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HLL recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for HLL recruitment is scheduled for 22nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which HLL is recruiting?
faq.answer: HLL Lifecare Limited is recruiting for the positions of Accounts Assistant and Accounts Officer through this walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Accounts Assistant position, candidates must possess a B.Com degree along with at least 2 years of post-qualification experience in accounts and finance functions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the HLL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 37 years as of 1st July 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original certificates, self-attested copies, proof of age, qualification, mark sheets, experience certificates, salary slips, Aadhaar, PAN, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these HLL posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test consisting of Multiple Choice Questions and a Verification of original certificates and documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the written test?
faq.answer: The written test for the HLL recruitment will be of 30 minutes duration and will have a maximum of 50 marks, with no negative marking.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, at the HLL office. The exact address and timing will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job type for these positions is on a Contract basis, as indicated in the recruitment details.
